NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​XMLAppCastGenerator

public
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​XMLAppCastGenerator

An XML-based app cast document downloader and handler

SignatureAttribute
public static readonly string SignatureAttribute

Default XML attribute name for a signature for an unspecified algorithm

Functions
XMLAppCastGenerator
public XMLAppCastGenerator(
ILogger? 
logger
 = 
null
)

An app cast generator that reads/writes XML

Parameter
logger
ILogger?

Optional  for logging data

Properties
HumanReadableOutput
public bool HumanReadableOutput {
get;
set
}

Set to true to make serialized output human readable (newlines, indents) when written to a file.  Set to false to make this output not necessarily human readable.  Defaults to true.

OutputSignatureAttribute
public string OutputSignatureAttribute {
get;
set
}

Output attribute title for signatures. Defaults to .

GenerateAppCastXml
public XDocument GenerateAppCastXml(
List<AppCastItem> 
appCastItems,
string? 
title,
string? 
link
= 
"",
string? 
description
= 
"",
string? 
language
= 
"en"
)

Create app cast XML document as an  object

Parameters
appCastItems
List<AppCastItem>

The  list to include in the output file

title
string?

Application title/title for the app cast

link
string?

Link to the where the app cast is going to be downloaded

description
string?

Text that describes the app cast (e.g. what it provides)

language
string?

Language of the app cast file

Returns

An  xml document that describes the list of passed in update items
